summary: Completed comprehensive testing of unified snapshot logic implementation. All specified endpoints working correctly with unified buildFullSeries() function. Verified series structure [history] → anchor → [forecast], anchorIndex calculation, and v3.2.0-unified model version across all assets.
passed_tests: BTC focus-pack /api/fractal/v2.1/focus-pack?focus=30d - series has history + anchor + forecast structure
BTC focus-pack /api/fractal/v2.1/focus-pack?focus=90d - series length ~180 (90 history + 90 forecast)
SPX focus-pack /api/spx/v2.1/focus-pack?horizon=90d - series length ~290 (200 history + 90 forecast)
DXY terminal /api/fractal/dxy/terminal?focus=30d - series with history + forecast
DXY terminal /api/fractal/dxy/terminal?focus=90d - series length ~455 (365 replay + 90 hybrid)
BTC prediction snapshots anchorIndex properly set at position 90
DXY prediction snapshots series contains history and forecast with valid anchorIndex
All horizon variations (7d, 14d, 30d, 90d) working correctly across BTC/SPX/DXY
Prediction snapshots have unified features: anchorIndex and proper series structure
Series temporal consistency: timestamps properly ordered with history before anchor and forecast after
Unified extractSnapshotPayload function working correctly for all asset types
buildFullSeries() function properly building [history] → anchor → [forecast] structure
